steps.title: Find the duration detail
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate how long John Cage's musical piece will last. The relevant note says the performance will last 639 years.

steps.title: Ignore unrelated facts
steps.content: B gives the location and current performance status. C says when an organ began playing the piece. D identifies the composer. The sentence that begins with 'Lasting 639 years' directly provides the requested duration. The answer is A.
